spec.expr: (sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="used"})) / (sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="used"}) + sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="avail"})) * 100

(sum by(instance, mount_point) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{dimension="used", instance=~"$instance"}) / sum by(instance, mount_point) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{instance=~"$instance"})) * 100 > 90
